comment: Five-basket portfolio architecture. Weights are config-driven; changing the deployed allocation is a config edit, NOT a code change. Weights across enabled baskets must sum to 1.0. Stage 1 = Basket 2 (BTC) 50% + Basket 3 (QQQ) 50%.

rebalance.comment: Rebalance a basket back toward target weight only when its realized weight drifts >10% relative from target (e.g. 50% target, rebalance if it leaves 45-55% band). Avoids tax-inefficient calendar rebalancing. Reviewed at each daily close; acted on only at filter-state transitions where a trade is already happening (no standalone rebalance trades in Stage 1).

1.name: High risk / return
filed_candidates: TQQQ trend 50/200 — TESTED, Tier D (leverage amplifies whipsaw ~as much as return; no Calmar improvement). reports/leverage/00_tqqq_trend.md

strategies.validated: reports/crypto/01_test1_tame_drawdown.md (Tier B, Calmar 1.38, MaxDD 43% vs BAH 83%)

4.name: Moderate growth with diversification
filed_candidates: Commodity long-short V3 vol-adj momentum — NEAR-MISS Tier C, deferred to $25k+ multi-strategy. Positive in 4/5 equity-stress windows, -0.05 equity corr. reports/commodity_trend/CANDIDATE_FOR_RESURRECTION.md
4.activation_criteria: Account >= $25k AND a fresh re-validation against then-current criteria (per the resurrection doc). Config-enable + set weight when criteria met.

5.name: Complex multi-strategy diversification
filed_candidates: Bond trend 50/200 on ZN/ZB/ZF — TESTED Tier D on standalone Sortino (0.47) BUT real diversification properties: -0.29 equity corr, positive in 4/4 equity-stress windows, dodged the 2022 bond crash (+2% vs BAH -10/-22%). reports/bonds/00_test1_bond_trend.md
5.activation_criteria: Deploy small (5-10%) as a crisis overlay only if/when (a) account is large enough to tolerate a low-standalone-return sleeve for its diversification value, OR (b) live equity drawdowns make the crisis-hedge worth the calm-period bleed. The bond strategy's value is regime-conditional, not standalone.
